final:
module top_module(
  input CLK,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  input reset,
  output ENCLK
);reg ENCLK_reg;

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK, posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      ENCLK_reg <= 1'b0;
    end else if (EN && TE) begin
      ENCLK_reg <= ~ENCLK_reg;
    end
  end

  assign ENCLK = ENCLK_reg;

endmodule
